legend:
How to read this bracket
✓Your pick — won / through
✕Your pick — out
Correct path — feeder line into the next game
Still to play — pending feeder line
▲Who actually advanced (you had the other team)
Actual path — feeder line of the real result
›You have this team advancing
🏆Your champion pick
